category_sources: source_facts.description says CVS utilities for use in working directories; official homepage describes CVS Utilities as scripts for managing CVS working directory files.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is CVS Utilities; source_facts.name is cvsutils.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best documentation surface found and describes usage, features, downloads, and related CVS context.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage provides release downloads and project information but no official source-control repository URL was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list CVS utility commands; official homepage describes scripts for managing CVS working directories.
